creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
wen         2010-11-05 01:14:44 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils             Makefile 
  Added files:
    sysutils/p5-File-Log Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  File::Log is a class providing methods to log data to a file. There are
  a number of parameters that can be passed to allow configuration of the
  logger.
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/File-Log/
  
  PR:             ports/151944
  Submitted by:   Tom Judge <tom@tomjudge.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1246    +1 -0      ports/sysutils/Makefile
  1.1       +20 -0     ports/sysutils/p5-File-Log/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/sysutils/p5-File-Log/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/sysutils/p5-File-Log/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/sysutils/p5-File-Log/pkg-plist (new)
